name: Arkana
description: Your entire malware analysis lab, behind one AI prompt. 294 MCP tools for binary analysis (PE/ELF/Mach-O/shellcode) with angr, capa, FLOSS, YARA, Binary Refinery, Qiling, Speakeasy, oletools, and GoReSym integrations. Includes a 65-tool emulation debugger, multi-binary project workspaces, BSim function similarity, partial CFG acceptance, and a built-in dashboard.
